name: 15-Step Loop
description: Long-running task with 15 incremental steps - tests stability and token accumulation
task: Build a small snake game in JavaScript
steps: Initialize a new JavaScript project for a snake game
Create the HTML structure with a canvas element
Initialize game state variables for snake and food
Create the game loop using requestAnimationFrame
Implement keyboard event listeners for arrow keys
Add food spawning logic with random positions
Implement collision detection for walls and self
Create game over state with restart option
Style the game board with CSS
